description:
Returns which types of repair/refuel/rearm service are allowed. The two available types are manual, where the action is displayed to the user, and auto, where the service happens within distance.
The engine default is both (manual and auto) for historic reasons.
examples: <sqf>if (allowedService _vehicle == -1) then { hint "this is not a service vehicle!" };</sqf>
name: allowedService
